title: Giao tiếp xã hội: Học tập và thời gian rảnh

topics.name: Học tập
questions: What subject do you enjoy studying most?
How do you usually prepare for an exam?

questions: What do you usually do after class?

title: Thảo luận giải pháp: Chương trình sức khỏe học đường

content.situation: Your school wants to help students become healthier, but it can choose only one new program this term.
solutions: Add one more physical education class each week
Provide healthier food in the school cafeteria
Organize monthly health workshops
content.task: Choose the best solution. Explain why it is better than the other two options.

selection_reason: Phù hợp để luyện nói theo định dạng VSTEP và hiển thị nhất quán bằng tiếng Việt.

title: Thảo luận giải pháp: Giao thông gần trường

content.situation: Traffic around your university campus is crowded and unsafe during rush hour.
solutions: Create a free shuttle bus from nearby stations
Build more parking areas for motorbikes and cars
Limit private vehicles near the main gate at peak times
content.task: Choose the best solution and explain why it would solve the problem most effectively.

selection_reason: Phù hợp để luyện nói theo định dạng VSTEP và hiển thị nhất quán bằng tiếng Việt.

title: Thảo luận giải pháp: Cải thiện câu lạc bộ tiếng Anh

content.situation: The English club at your college has fewer members than before. The organizers want to make it more useful.
solutions: Invite guest speakers every month
Hold weekly speaking games and debates
Create an online group for sharing learning materials
content.task: Choose one solution and explain why it would attract more students.

title: Thảo luận giải pháp: Giảm nhựa tại quán cà phê

content.situation: A popular campus café wants to reduce single-use plastic without losing customers.
solutions: Give discounts to customers who bring reusable cups
Replace plastic packaging with paper packaging
Charge a small fee for plastic cups and bags
content.task: Choose the most practical solution and discuss its advantages and disadvantages.

content.situation: A company has noticed that many employees feel stressed and tired at work.

Provide free counselling sessions
Reduce the number of weekly meetings

title: Phát triển chủ đề: Công nghệ trong giáo dục

content.prompt: Discuss how technology has changed the way students learn. You may talk about access to materials, teacher-student interaction, independent learning and possible risks.
follow_up_questions: Do you think online learning can replace traditional classrooms?
What skills do students need to learn effectively online?
How can teachers prevent students from becoming distracted by technology?

title: Phát triển chủ đề: Giao thông công cộng và thành phố

content.topic: Giao thông công cộng trong thành phố hiện đại
content.prompt: Discuss why public transport is important for city life. You may consider traffic, the environment, cost and convenience.
follow_up_questions: What makes people choose private vehicles instead of public transport?
Should public transport be free for students? Why?
How can cities make buses or trains more attractive?

title: Phát triển chủ đề: Trách nhiệm môi trường

content.prompt: Discuss who should take the greatest responsibility for protecting the environment: individuals, businesses or governments. You may use your own examples.

content.prompt: Discuss why work-life balance is important. You may talk about health, family life, productivity and modern working styles.

title: Phát triển chủ đề: AI và việc làm tương lai

content.topic: Trí tuệ nhân tạo và việc làm tương lai
